description_long: This cabin consists of three connected rectangular modules, each with a flat, dark-colored roof and white exterior walls. The structure is elevated slightly above the ground on short supports, giving it a modern, modular appearance. The front module features a single, tall, narrow window, while the middle module has a similar window, and the rear module displays a set of three square windows arranged horizontally. The doors are located on the sides of the modules, with each module having a single, vertically oriented door. The cabin sits on a grassy plot with a black base, suggesting a landscaped or urban park setting. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on geometric simplicity.
description: A modern, modular cabin with three connected white units, flat dark roofs, and minimalist windows and doors, elevated on short supports.
description_view_0: Three white cabin modules with dark flat roofs are visible, showing the staggered arrangement and side doors.
description_view_1: The rear module's three square windows are prominent, with the modules aligned in a row and no doors visible.
description_view_2: The staggered arrangement of the modules is clear, with two side doors and narrow windows visible.
description_view_3: The front facades of the three modules are visible, each with a single tall, narrow window and no doors.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with slight overhangs, constructed from dark material
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical arrangement with two tall, narrow windows on the front modules and three square windows grouped horizontally on the rear module
attribute_door_placement: Single vertically oriented doors on the sides of each module, not visible from the front or rear views
